name: Ahmed Hassan
subject: Bulk Order Inquiry
message: Hi, I'm interested in placing a bulk order for the Classic Cotton Kurta Sets. Can you offer a discount for 20+ pieces? Please contact me on WhatsApp.

name: Maria Qureshi
subject: Custom Bridal Order
message: I would like to inquire about custom bridal lehenga orders. Is it possible to customize the color and embroidery pattern? My wedding is in August.

name: Usman Tariq
subject: Return Request
message: I received my order (ORD-1004) but the size doesn't fit. I'd like to exchange it for a larger size. Please guide me on the return process.
